qa_pairs.question: What action should be taken if the host key fingerprint does not appear on the published list?
qa_pairs.answer: If the host key fingerprint does not appear on our published list, you should terminate the connection and contact technical support.

qa_pairs.question: When did a security upgrade occur on the Niagara cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: One such upgrade occurred on the Niagara cluster on May 31, 2019.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find information about the one-time action required after the Niagara cluster security upgrade?
qa_pairs.answer: Information about the one-time action required from users after the Niagara cluster security upgrade can be found on this page: https://docs.scinet.utoronto.ca/index.php/SSH_Changes_in_May_2019.

qa_pairs.question: When were further security upgrades made to all clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Further upgrades of this type were made on all clusters in September/October 2019.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find more information about the security improvements made to all clusters in September/October 2019?
qa_pairs.answer: More information about these security improvements can be found by consulting 'SSH security improvements'.
